entity.label: Maath
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Small, a person named in our Lord’s ancestry (Luke 3:26).

nodes.label: Maath
nodes.description: Small, a person named in our Lord’s ancestry (Luke 3:26).

nodes.label: Mattathias
nodes.description: The son of Semei, in the same genealogy (Luke 3:26).

verses.text: Which was the son of Maath, which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Semei, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Juda,
